flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Otterbein University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.9k → $27.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Otterbein University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Otterbein University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 (41.0% → 50.3%).
